job_description:
# Sr. Healthcare Data Analyst (Medicaid)
Company: General Dynamics / GDIT
Source: Dice
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 29, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/0829c8cb-ebfe-43e1-ab65-ecc8df659c31

## Highlights
- Full-time remote role posted 1 day ago on Dice.
- Supports CMS Medicare/Medicaid program analytics for fraud, waste, and abuse detection through advanced analytics and visualization.
- Requires 5+ years of Medicaid claims analysis and reporting, T-MSIS, SQL, Python, Tableau, Databricks, Snowflake or similar tools.
- Remote work location with limited travel.
strengths: Strong healthcare claims, Medicaid/Medicare, SQL, reporting, and data analysis alignment.
Remote full-time role with healthcare analytics and visualization responsibilities.
Databricks/Snowflake can be positioned as current upskilling without overstating production depth.
gaps: T-MSIS and fraud/waste/abuse analytics are not explicit in the resume.
Python, Databricks, and Snowflake should be framed carefully as growing skills unless supported by project evidence.
notes: Apply if time. Tailor toward Medicaid/claims analytics, SQL, reporting validation, payer data quality, and stakeholder-ready insights; list T-MSIS/FWA as gaps.
